## Meeting Purpose

[Review article generation process and content strategy for client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Article generation workflow can be optimized by batching tasks, customizing outlines, and using targeted feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Showcasing the sophisticated AI-powered research and expert guidance process helps differentiate from basic AI content](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Content strategy should involve identifying branching topics from research to develop comprehensive topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=4180.0)

## Topics

### Article Generation Workflow

  - [Run multiple article generations in parallel at the start of the day to batch research tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Customize outlines by expanding sections, adding detail, and incorporating client context](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Use targeted feedback on specific sections rather than broad rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Experiment with different "archetypes" and writing styles during calibration](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)

### Differentiating from Basic AI Content

  - [Explain sophisticated research process involving hundreds of sources](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Showcase expert guidance and editorial judgment applied throughout](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Highlight ability to generate high-quality, ranking content (e.g. D-Graph example)](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=3996.0)
  - [Involve clients in calibration process to build excitement and trust](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Identify branching topic ideas while reviewing generated content](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=4210.0)
  - [Use academic papers and in-depth sources to develop comprehensive topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=4320.0)
  - [Apply critical thinking to find angles relevant to client's audience](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=4386.0)
  - [Demonstrate deep subject matter knowledge in client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=4386.0)

### Troubleshooting and Optimization

  - [Document specific problematic examples to help improve the system](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=3869.0)
  - [Experiment with different prompting approaches in tools like ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=3440.0)
  - [Balance depth vs volume based on client priorities](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=3776.0)
  - [Leverage new features like "smart mode" for faster generation](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ensure all client accounts have complete company context in Ocean](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Experiment with different archetypes/writing styles during calibration](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)
  - [Document and share learnings about effective prompting approaches](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=3869.0)
  - [Identify branching topic ideas while reviewing generated content](https://fathom.video/share/ay3XaXRRW3KW742xr1vM7s4cEezMUAkn?tab=summary&timestamp=4210.0)
